note: Combined recall-vs-QPS Pareto with all batch levers composed: tiling (016) x prefix scan-bits (014) x rerank C, on the binary funnel. Tiling is the universal lever (no recall cost); prefix only helps BELOW ~0.97 recall (at high recall, full scan + tiling wins because recovering recall needs so much C that truncation loses). Best high-recall point 1024/C=1000 = 0.993 @ 850 QPS; highest recall 1024/C=2000 = 0.9975 @ 731. Both beat original 009 (0.994 @ 585) on recall AND throughput.
